title: Jamie Murray Says Goodbye to Tennis
summary: Jamie Murray, a famous tennis player, has decided to stop playing tennis. He is 40 years old and has won seven big tournaments called Grand Slams. He said it was a tough year for him, and he has not played since last August. Now, he is excited to start a new life outside of tennis. This news comes from the BBC, a trusted news source. Jamie Murray is known for being a great doubles player and has had a long career. His retirement means he will no longer compete in tennis matches, but fans will remember his achievements.

a sport played with a racket and ball
tennis played with two players on each team
the time someone works in a job or sport

He is moving to a new country
questions.correct_answer: He is excited to enter the real world

background_read: Jamie Murray is a professional tennis player from the United Kingdom who specialized in doubles. He has won many titles, including seven Grand Slam tournaments, which are the biggest events in tennis. Retirement in sports means a player stops competing, often due to age, injury, or personal choice. The BBC is a well-known news organization that reports on sports events and player news.
Article_Structure: WHO: Jamie Murray, a 40-year-old tennis player
WHAT: He retired from tennis after a tough year
WHY: He was excited to start a new life outside of tennis

perspectives.description: Jamie Murray feels positive about moving on from tennis after a difficult year.
